subcodes.first_line: O you who are the scion of the Prince of the City of Statesmanship and Literary Accomplishment
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل سید مدینه تدبیر و انشاء و امیر اقلیم عقل و نهی مدتیست که با تو
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
